info.title: Forge API
info.description: Local-first execution, planning, memory, health, and Psyche API for the Forge runtime.

description.description: Optional replacement for the habit's current description. When provided, this overwrites habit.description.

get.summary: Read connected calendars, mirrored events, work blocks, and timeboxes

post.summary: Create a Google, Apple, or custom CalDAV calendar connection
post.description: Forge first discovers the writable calendars for the account, then stores the chosen mirrored calendars and either reuses the existing shared Forge write target or saves a new one when needed.

post.summary: Sync one connected calendar provider
Create a recurring work-block template
Create a planned task timebox
Suggest future timeboxes for a task
post.description: Recommendations consider provider events, work blocks, scheduling rules, and planned duration.

get.summary: List native and mirrored calendar events for a range

post.summary: Create a native Forge calendar event
post.description: Forge stores the event canonically first, then projects it to a connected writable calendar when a preferred calendar is selected.

patch.summary: Update a Forge calendar event and sync remote projections

delete.summary: Delete a Forge calendar event and remove projected remote copies

patch.description: Project lifecycle is status-driven. Set status to paused to suspend, completed to finish, or active to restart. Updating a project to completed auto-completes linked unfinished tasks through the normal task completion flow.

delete.description: Project DELETE defaults to soft delete. Pass mode=hard only when permanent removal is intended.

get.summary: Get the board and evidence for one project

post.summary: Create a life goal

delete.summary: Delete a habit check-in for one day

Create a task

201.description: Created work adjustment and refreshed XP state

get.summary: Get task detail context including project, goal, runs, and evidence

tags.name: Meta
tags.description: OpenAPI discovery and route-level API metadata.

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Runtime health, sleep, sports, workout, and mobile sync surfaces.

tags.description: Movement overviews, timeline history, known places, stays, trips, selection aggregates, and user-defined overlay routes.

tags.description: Energy-budget, fatigue, and action-point modeling routes.

tags.description: Local runtime settings, settings bin, and token management.

tags.description: Approval workflows for deferred or gated agent actions.

tags.description: Batch create, update, delete, restore, and search operations across entity types.

tags.name: Goals
tags.description: Long-horizon life goals.

tags.name: Projects
tags.description: Project execution surfaces and project summaries.

tags.description: Directed planning structures that sit above project execution.
